message:
feat(layout): enhance Breakpoint with Xl tier, Display, Ord (bd-130l.1)

Add Xl breakpoint (160+ cols), PartialOrd/Ord/Hash derives, Display impl,
label() method, ALL constant, new_with_xl() constructor, threshold() and
thresholds() query methods. Existing Breakpoints::new() auto-derives xl.
150 layout tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+// This module is superseded by the Breakpoint implementation in lib.rs.
+// See: Breakpoint, Breakpoints
